title: polypodium contingens
intro: Polypodium contingens, also known as Polypodium leucotomos, is a type of plant belonging to the Polypodiaceae family, commonly found in Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Polypodium contingens include protecting the skin from sun damage, reducing the risk of skin cancer, and promoting overall well-being. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of creams, capsules, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including skin disorders and inflammatory diseases.
